user.title: Add your first pet
user.description: Pawsistant stores all data locally in Home Assistant — no cloud account required.

data_description.species: Type of animal (e.g. Dog, Cat, Rabbit). Used in sensor names and card labels.

abort.already_configured: Pawsistant is already configured. Use the pawsistant.add_dog service to add more pets.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_dog.title: Add a pet
add_dog.description: Enter the details for your new pet.

data_description.species: Type of animal (e.g. Dog, Cat, Rabbit). Used in sensor names and card labels.

remove_dog.title: Remove a pet
remove_dog.description: ⚠️ This will permanently delete all events for this pet.

manage_event_types.title: Event Types
manage_event_types.description: {count} event types configured. Built-in types cannot be deleted.

edit_event_type.title: {mode} Event Type
edit_event_type.description: Set the display name, icon (MDI), color, and button metric for this event type.

data_description.event_type_key: Lowercase letters, numbers, underscores only. Max 30 characters. Cannot be changed after creation.
data_description.icon: Must start with mdi: or hass: (e.g. mdi:walk)
data_description.metric: What to show on the sensor button. daily_count = "3 today", days_since = "2 days", last_value = "28.5 lbs", hours_since = "5 hours"

error.name_already_exists: A pet with this name is already registered.
error.dog_not_found: Pet not found. Please refresh and try again.
error.store_unavailable: Integration storage is unavailable. Please reload the integration and try again.
error.cannot_delete_default: Built-in event types cannot be deleted. You can edit their name, icon, or color instead.
error.key_too_long: Event type ID must be 30 characters or fewer.
error.invalid_key_format: Event type ID must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.key_already_exists: An event type with this ID already exists.
error.invalid_icon_format: Icon must start with mdi: or hass: (e.g. mdi:walk).
error.invalid_color_format: Color must be a valid hex code (e.g. #4CAF50).
error.invalid_metric: Button metric must be one of: daily_count, days_since, last_value, hours_since.

log_event.name: Log Event
log_event.description: Log a pet activity event. The event is stored locally and triggers an immediate sensor update.

event_type.name: Event Type
event_type.description: The type of event to log.

note.name: Note
note.description: Optional note for the event (e.g. medicine name, vet comments).

value.name: Value
value.description: Optional numeric value (e.g. weight in lbs).

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp override (e.g. "2026-03-18T10:30:00-04:00"). Defaults to now if omitted.

delete_event.name: Delete Event
delete_event.description: Delete a previously logged event by its unique ID. The event_id is available as an attribute on most-recent-event sensors.

event_id.name: Event ID
event_id.description: The UUID of the event to delete.

update_event.name: Update Event
update_event.description: Update a previously logged event's timestamp, note, or value. Only fields you provide are changed — omitted fields are left untouched. The event_type cannot be changed.

event_id.name: Event ID
event_id.description: The UUID of the event to update.

timestamp.name: Timestamp
timestamp.description: New ISO 8601 timestamp (e.g. "2026-03-18T10:30:00-04:00"). Omit to keep the original timestamp.

note.name: Note
note.description: New note text. Omit to keep the original note.

value.name: Value
value.description: New numeric value (e.g. weight in lbs). Omit to keep the original value.

add_dog.name: Add Pet
add_dog.description: Register a new pet. A new set of sensors will appear after HA reloads the integration (or after the next coordinator refresh).

species.name: Animal type
species.description: Type of animal (e.g. Dog, Cat, Rabbit). Defaults to Dog.

remove_dog.name: Remove Pet
remove_dog.description: Remove a pet and permanently delete all of its events. This action cannot be undone.

dog.name: Pet
dog.description: The name of the pet to remove (case-insensitive).

list_events.name: List Events
list_events.description: Query events for a pet and return the results via service response (`response_variable`). Use this in automations to inspect recent activity.

days.name: Days
days.description: How many days back to search (default 7, max 3650).

import_events.name: Import Events
import_events.description: Bulk-import events from an external JSON array. Intended for one-time migration from the Firebase-backed version of DogLog. Events whose `id` already exists in the local store are skipped.

events.name: Events
events.description: A JSON array of event objects. Each object should have at minimum: dog_id, event_type, timestamp. An `id` field is optional — one will be generated if absent.

update_event_type.name: Update Event Type
update_event_type.description: Update the display name, icon, color, or button metric for an existing event type. Only the fields you provide are changed — omitted fields are left untouched. Built-in and custom types can both be updated. The sensor immediately reflects the changes after the call.

event_type.name: Event type key
event_type.description: The event type key to update (e.g. walk, food, my_custom_type).

name.name: Display name
name.description: New display name for the event type.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: New icon in mdi: format (e.g. mdi:walk, mdi:bowl). Browse icons at https://pictogrammers.com/library/mdi/

color.name: Color
color.description: New hex color (e.g. #4CAF50). Must be a 6-digit hex color.

metric.name: Button metric
metric.description: What to show on the sensor button. Options: daily_count (N today), days_since (N days), last_value (value from most recent event), hours_since (N hours). Default if omitted is daily_count.

add_event_type.name: Add Event Type
add_event_type.description: Add a new custom event type. Built-in types (food, walk, etc.) cannot be recreated — use update_event_type to modify them instead. After adding, a new button appears in the card automatically.

event_type.name: Event type key
event_type.description: Unique lowercase ID using only a-z, 0-9, and underscores. Max 30 chars. Example: outdoor_walk or vet_checkup.

name.name: Display name
name.description: Human-readable name shown on the card button.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: MDI icon in mdi: format (e.g. mdi:walk). Browse icons at https://pictogrammers.com/library/mdi/

color.name: Color
color.description: Hex color (e.g. #4CAF50). Must be a 6-digit hex color starting with #.

metric.name: Button metric
metric.description: What to show on the sensor button. Options: daily_count (N today), days_since (N days), last_value (value from most recent event), hours_since (N hours). Defaults to daily_count if omitted.

delete_event_type.name: Delete Event Type
delete_event_type.description: Permanently delete a custom event type. Built-in types (food, walk, etc.) cannot be deleted — use update_event_type to modify them instead. Events already logged with this type are preserved in the database.

event_type.name: Event type key
event_type.description: The event type key to delete (e.g. my_custom_type).

set_shown_types.name: Set Shown Types
set_shown_types.description: Set the visible event type buttons (and their order) for a specific dog. Changes persist server-side so they sync across all devices and dashboards.

dog.name: Dog
dog.description: The name of the dog to configure.

shown_types.name: Shown types
shown_types.description: Ordered list of event type keys to show as buttons.
